response.justification: Bogdan brings over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, testing, and cloud-native tooling — plus proven architecture and cross-language proficiency. His open-source contributions and teaching background signal strong collaboration and engineering rigor, though his German language skills are limited and Nest.js/Vitest are not explicitly named.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow development experience at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions, testing culture, and DevOps/CI-CD infrastructure expertise
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack requirements
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
Lack of explicit mention of relational databases (PostgreSQL/MySQL) in recent roles
